SuperAdmin.title: SuperAdmin
SuperAdmin.description: Represents a super administrator account with elevated privileges to manage the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SuperAdmin entity.

email.description: Email address of the super administrator.

firstName.description: First name of the super administrator.

lastName.description: Last name of the super administrator.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the super administrator account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the super administrator account was last updated.

Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business using the platform to manage their Google My Business profile and online presence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

status.description: The current status of the business account.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the business was added to the platform.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the business was last updated.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a review received by a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

businessId.description: Reference to Business. (Relationship: Business 1:N Review). The business that received the review.

rating.description: Rating given in the review (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the review was received.

LandingPage.title: LandingPage
LandingPage.description: Represents a landing page created for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LandingPage entity.

businessId.description: Reference to Business. (Relationship: Business 1:N LandingPage). The business that owns the landing page.

content.description: HTML or markdown content of the landing page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the landing page was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the landing page was last updated.

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: Represents a subscription plan that businesses can subscribe to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubscriptionPlan entity.

description.description: A short description of the plan.

features.description: A list of features included in the plan.

order.description: The display order of the plan.

isActive.description: Whether the plan is currently active and available for subscription.

isPopular.description: Whether the plan should be highlighted as popular.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the plan was last updated.

definition.description: Stores super administrator accounts. Used for authentication and authorization.
Stores business accounts managed by super admins.
Stores reviews associated with a specific business.
Stores landing pages associated with a specific business.
Stores all available subscription plans for the platform.
